name: DocLayNet
data_format: COCO page-layout boxes + PNG pages + extra PDF/JSON
notes: Human-annotated 11-label layout dataset; best current public fit for Task A; Picture/Footnote/Formula need conservative mapping.

name: PubLayNet
data_format: COCO page-layout boxes + page images + released page PDFs
notes: Auto-generated from PMC OA commercial-use subset rather than human gold labels; useful adapter baseline but not main gold source.

name: PubTables-1M
data_format: table detection/structure annotations + page images/table crops
notes: Strong table supervision for Task A table_like, but current repo only has first-row metadata and official license needs a second pass.

name: DocBank
license: Apache-2.0 repo; README says do not redistribute data
notes: Weakly supervised academic-paper corpus; useful for local adapter experiments only until data redistribution terms are clarified.

name: TableBank
license: Apache-2.0 repo; README says research purpose only
risk: Hundreds of thousands of tables; low PII
notes: Good single-label booster for table_like, but not a general Task A corpus and not suitable for tracked bytes here.

name: FUNSD
data_format: form images + OCR words + entity JSON
notes: Manually annotated and useful for form/key-value sanity, but license and scanned-form provenance make it a side corpus only.

name: LayoutParser Dataset Zoo
notes: Not a dataset itself; use only as discovery index for adapters and mirrors.

name: DeepFigures
notes: Potential caption booster, but source packaging and redistribution terms need a separate pass before any byte tracking.

name: RVL-CDIP
notes: Document classification only, not a block-label corpus; may help negative document sourcing but not direct Task A training.

name: IIT-CDIP
notes: Upstream source for RVL-CDIP/FUNSD provenance; no confirmed Task A block labels and no clear redistribution path collected this round.

name: CORD
notes: Useful for form-like rows, but receipt-specific and PII-sensitive, so keep out of tracked subset policy for now.

name: SROIE
notes: Registration gate plus unclear redistribution makes it unsuitable for tracked Task A bytes.
